title: apium graveolens var. sativum
intro: Apium graveolens var. sativum, also known as garden parsley, is a variety of the parsley plant, which is a biennial herb in the carrot family. The medicinal properties of garden parsley include its ability to act as an antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic, making it useful for treating conditions such as digestive issues and urinary tract problems. The health benefits of garden parsley include its high vitamin and mineral content, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve heart health. Garden parsley can be consumed in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used fresh in salads and as a garnish.
